title: 申请加入请在这里评论 （也可以直接发 Pull Request）
summary:
### 入选标准
* 网站 / App
* 如果是 Github 库， README 或顶部描述里，要附上网站或 App Store 地址，不能是纯粹针对开发者的工具，如果包含了针对开发者的工具，那就太多了。所以只允许针对普通用户的网站/App 列在表里

### 不收录的东西
* 开发者工具（Github 本质上就是个开发者工具大集合，收录开发者工具这个表会爆炸的）
* 社区类网站（v2ex，ruby-china，各种 php 社区，太多太多太多了。没法收。希望理解）

### 流程
看了评论后会做决定，
如果入了，会加进去。
如果没入，会告知你理由（希望你不要介意 :

title: [PR] [Large Schema Series] Batch new-entity-field metadata INSERTs (4/5)
summary:
## What
Part 4 of the **[Large Schema Series]**. `createNewEntityFieldsFromSchema` issued **one INSERT + one synchronous migration-log append per field** — ~40k round-trips on a 2,000-table install (~37s).

Now it collects each row's INSERT SQL (unchanged — conflict guards intact) and flushes in 250

Adds **optional Langfuse (LLM observability)** for the "שאל את סנסיי" assistant chat, so we can see per-request traces — model, tokens, cost, latency, tool calls, errors — grouped by therapist and conversation.

**Off by default.** With `LANGFUSE_ENABLED` unset, behaviour is byte-for-

title: [PR] feat(coding-agent): credential broker with pooled selection and background refresh
summary:
## Summary
Loopback credential broker that stores OAuth/API-key credentials in a SQLite vault and leases them to authorized gateway clients:

- `auth-multi-account` / `credential-selection` / `in-memory-credential-vault`: multi-account credential contracts, pooled selection, in-memory vault.
- `auth

title: [PR] Checkfixes
summary:
Trying to reduce the amount of noisy checks.

Adds several new auto-fix scripts (mostly written by claude). The fix scripts should be run with supervision and not incorporated into any sort of automated pipeline.
---

* Added `fix_absolute_site_link.py` to automatically rewrite absolute site UR

title: [PR] [Router] llm router classifier + routing.router desugaring (#2405)
summary:
Closes #2405

## Summary

Implements the L0(a) "LLM-as-router" on-ramp: a new `llm` classifier type plus load-time desugaring of `routing.router` into the explicit core form, keeping the one-engine invariant — everything still compiles down to classifiers + rules + a Decision.
